title: Prohibit Adapter Access Outside Projection Boundaries
forbids: engine-adapter access from Standard recipe stages outside map projection and terminal Placement boundaries
why: Physics and planning stages communicate through admitted artifacts; only materialization and terminal Placement stages may observe or mutate Civ7 engine state.
remediate: Consume an admitted artifact upstream, or move engine materialization into a map projection or terminal Placement step.
message: Engine-adapter access crossed the Standard recipe projection boundary.
